title: 《伤寒论》及后世评注公共转录本校勘见证

retrieval.method: HTTP GET with redirects and a browser-compatible user agent
retrieval.hashMeaning: SHA256 and bytes identify the exact HTML response retrieved for this audit; dynamic pages may produce a different response hash on a later retrieval.
retrieval.archivalBoundary: Only transformed metadata and short public-domain passage witnesses are stored here; fetched HTML is not copied into the repository.

witnesses.locator: 宋本伤寒论公共转录页
witnesses.supports: Supports 項背強幾幾 and 身濈然汗出而解 where the local file contains an OCR placeholder or a different transmitted wording.
witnesses.excerpt: 項背強幾幾；身濈然汗出而解
witnesses.limitations: Open digital transcription; useful for character-level collation but not a substitute for an identified print edition or image facsimile.

witnesses.supports: Independently supports 身濈然汗出而解 for the passage represented locally as 身濈然汗出解也.
witnesses.limitations: Community-maintained digital transcription; used only as a collation witness.

witnesses.supports: Attributes 此为仲景群方之魁 to the later commentary 伤寒附翼 rather than to the body text of 伤寒论.
witnesses.limitations: Later commentary witness used to correct attribution; it is not evidence that the phrase occurs in the 伤寒论 body text.
